# Pilot Conversion Scaffold Fixtures

This directory contains placeholder, synthetic, non-donor scaffold notes only.

These files do not run conversion, do not contain actual converted donor content, do not contain pilot outputs, and do not include real donor excerpts, donor statblocks, donor tables, donor maps, donor setting prose, donor proper nouns, or protected expression.

These files are not training data, not canon, not sourcebook prose, not benchmark corpora, not evaluation corpora, not runtime import data, not final schemas, and not final validators.
